expectations.text: Identifies tasks as the entry stage.
expectations.evidence: Baseline output was produced without the chain skill; it often handled missing files safely but lacked chain status and explicit gate discipline.

expectations.text: Does not regenerate PRD, technical design, audit standards, or task archive unless a required source is missing or insufficient.

expectations.text: Prepares an implementation handoff packet with PRD, technical design, task archive, audit standards if available, status file path, assumptions, blockers, and coding confirmation status.

expectations.text: Maintains delivery-chain-status.md because the chain skill was invoked.

timing.note: Timing metrics were not included in subagent completion notifications.

uncertainties: Several eval prompts referenced missing fixture paths, reducing discrimination between with-skill and baseline runs.
